Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Onyx Hvac to get the job done right.

“When our 20-year-old unit failed during July's 118° heatwave, Onyx had us cooled down by sunset. The technician sourced a rare compressor part for our vintage system instead of pushing replacement. His knowledge of our historic Encanto home's layout saved hours of work.”

Marta R. Emergency AC Repair
Jul 18, 2025

“Our new heat pump handles everything from 45° winter nights to summer extremes without breaking a sweat. The install crew preserved our Sistine Chapel-like ceiling during the ductwork - no drywall damage at all. Our APS bill dropped $80/month compared to the old AC.”

James L. Heat Pump Installation
Mar 22, 2025

“After years of the upstairs being 12° hotter than downstairs, Onyx found leaks at every junction in our 1980s Ahwatukee home. They used some specialized foil tape that's held through two monsoon seasons. Kids can finally sleep in their rooms during summer.”

Sophia K. Duct Sealing
Sep 5, 2025

“Their pre-summer check caught a failing capacitor that would've died during the heat dome. What impressed me most was how they explained the repair options without pressure - just honest advice about our 8-year-old system's remaining lifespan. Will always use their maintenance plan.”

Carlos M. Preventive Maintenance
May 30, 2025

“As an asthma sufferer, I was skeptical but desperate after last year's dust storms. The difference is night and day - no more wheezing after gardening or during haboobs. Installation was cleaner than some remodel work we've had done. Worth every penny.”

Aisha B. UV Air Purification
Aug 14, 2025

“Came home from work to a 92° house and a tripped breaker during that record September heat. Onyx had a tech out within 90 minutes who diagnosed a faulty contactor. Fixed it right there with parts he carried, no upselling. Even checked our whole system for other potential issues at no extra charge.”

Tom W. Emergency AC Repair
Sep 21, 2025
Onyx HVAC

Trusted hvac professionals serving Phoenix, AZ and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
